children.label: A
children.text: 33.34 percent of the foreign-derived deduction eligible income of such domestic corporation for such taxable year, plus

children.label: i
children.text: the net CFC tested income amount (if any) which is included in the gross income of such domestic corporation under section 951A for such taxable year, and

children.label: ii
children.text: the amount treated as a dividend received by such corporation under section 78 which is attributable to the amount described in clause (i).

children.label: i
children.text: the sum of the foreign-derived deduction eligible income and the net CFC tested income amount otherwise taken into account by the domestic corporation under paragraph (1), exceeds

children.label: ii
children.text: the taxable income of the domestic corporation (determined without regard to this section),

children.label: i
children.text: foreign-derived deduction eligible income shall be reduced by an amount which bears the same ratio to the excess described in subparagraph (A) as such foreign-derived deduction eligible income bears to the sum described in subparagraph (A)(i), and

children.label: ii
children.text: the net CFC tested income amount shall be reduced by the remainder of such excess.

children.label: i
children.text: which is sold by the taxpayer to any person who is not a United States person, and

children.label: ii
children.text: which the taxpayer establishes to the satisfaction of the Secretary is for a foreign use, or

children.label: B
children.text: services provided by the taxpayer which the taxpayer establishes to the satisfaction of the Secretary are provided to any person, or with respect to property, not located within the United States.

children.heading: Rules relating to foreign use property or services
children.label: 2 Rules relating to foreign use property or services

children.heading: Foreign use
children.label: A Foreign use
children.text: The term “foreign use” means any use, consumption, or disposition which is not within the United States.

children.heading: Property or services provided to domestic intermediaries
children.label: B Property or services provided to domestic intermediaries

children.heading: Property
children.label: i Property
children.text: If a taxpayer sells property to another person (other than a related party) for further manufacture or other modification within the United States, such property shall not be treated as sold for a foreign use even if such other person subsequently uses such property for a foreign use.

children.heading: Services
children.label: ii Services
children.text: If a taxpayer provides services to another person (other than a related party) located within the United States, such services shall not be treated as described in paragraph (1)(B) even if such other person uses such services in providing services which are so described.

children.heading: Special rules with respect to related party transactions
children.label: C Special rules with respect to related party transactions
I
children.text: such property is ultimately sold by a related party, or used by a related party in connection with property which is sold or the provision of services, to another person who is an unrelated party who is not a United States person, and

children.label: II
children.text: the taxpayer establishes to the satisfaction of the Secretary that such property is for a foreign use.

children.heading: Service provided to related parties
children.label: ii Service provided to related parties
children.text: If a service is provided to a related party who is not located in the United States, such service shall not be treated described in subparagraph (A)(ii) unless the taxpayer established to the satisfaction of the Secretary that such service is not substantially similar to services provided by such related party to persons located within the United States.12So in original. Probably should be preceded by “as”.1So in original. Probably should be “(B)(ii)”.2

children.label: i
children.text: by substituting “more than 50 percent” for “at least 80 percent” each place it appears, and

children.label: ii
children.text: without regard to paragraphs (2) and (3) of section 1504(b).

children.heading: Sold
children.label: E Sold
children.text: For purposes of this subsection (other than paragraph (3)(A)(i)(VII)), the terms “sold”, “sells”, and “sale” shall include any lease, license, exchange, or other disposition.

children.label: I
children.text: any amount included in the gross income of such corporation under section 951(a)(1),

children.label: II
children.text: the net CFC tested income included in the gross income of such corporation under section 951A,

children.label: III
children.text: any financial services income (as defined in section 904(d)(2)(D)) of such corporation,

children.label: IV
children.text: any dividend received from a corporation which is a controlled foreign corporation of such domestic corporation,

children.label: V
children.text: any domestic oil and gas extraction income of such corporation,

children.label: VI
children.text: any foreign branch income (as defined in section 904(d)(2)(J)), and

children.label: aa
children.text: intangible property (as defined in section 367(d)(4)), and

children.label: bb
children.text: any other property of a type that is subject to depreciation, amortization, or depletion by the seller, over

children.label: ii
children.text: expenses and deductions (including taxes), other than interest expense and research or experimental expenditures, properly allocable to such gross income.

children.heading: Domestic oil and gas extraction income
children.label: B Domestic oil and gas extraction income
children.text: For purposes of subparagraph (A), the term “domestic oil and gas extraction income” means income described in section 907(c)(1), determined by substituting “within the United States” for “without the United States”.

children.heading: Regulations
children.label: c Regulations
children.text: The Secretary shall prescribe such regulations or other guidance as may be necessary or appropriate to carry out the provisions of this section.
